title: German AI consortium releases Soofi S, an open 30B model that tops benchmarks
content: A German AI research consortium released Soofi S, an open-source 30B parameter model achieving top benchmark scores in English and German. The model represents Europe's push for AI sovereignty, trained on mixed-language data and released under an open license, challenging US-based AI lab dominance.
quote: 开源模型的胜利，闭源巨头的噩梦。

title: NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook - Google rebrands AI note-taking app
content: Google rebranded NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook, integrating its AI note-taking assistant deeper into the Gemini ecosystem. New features include multi-modal input support, real-time fact-checking, and better source citation. Users can now upload videos and audio for AI-powered analysis.
quote: 每天一个新模型，AI圈的摩尔定律还在加速。

title: Detecting LLM-Generated Texts with Classical Machine Learning
content: A research blog post demonstrates classical ML techniques can effectively detect LLM-generated text without GPU inference. Using perplexity, burstiness, and stylometric analysis, the approach achieves over 95% accuracy at a fraction of the cost of using another LLM for detection.
quote: AI安全不是锦上添花，是命门。

title: Agent-talk: Enabling coding agents to work together on the same codebase
content: Agent-talk is a new open-source framework allowing multiple AI coding agents to collaborate on the same codebase. Each agent specializes in different aspects (frontend, backend, testing) and can delegate tasks, share context, and review each other's code with built-in conflict resolution.
quote: 性能测试再好看，落地才是硬道理。

title: Traceforce (YC S26) - Company-wide security monitoring for AI apps
content: Traceforce provides visibility and control over AI apps (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) across company devices. It discovers which AI apps are used and how they connect to data sources via MCP protocols, enabling security teams to detect unsafe actions. Includes open-source MCP pentesting tool mcp-xray.
quote: Coding Agent协作时代来了，人类写spec就好。

title: How to Train a Gen AI Kick Drum Model on Your Old Linux Desktop
content: A detailed guide on training a generative AI kick drum synthesis model using consumer GPU hardware (6GB VRAM). Covers dataset preparation, diffusion model architecture, and optimization techniques. Demonstrates that AI music generation research is accessible to individual developers.
quote: 大模型降价潮，用户狂欢，小公司心惊。

title: LeAgent: Open-source full-stack agent framework for AI applications
content: LeAgent is a newly released open-source framework for building production-ready AI agent applications. Provides tools for agent memory management, tool-use capabilities, multi-agent coordination, and built-in support for popular LLM APIs including OpenAI, Anthropic, and open-source models.
quote: 多模态大势所趋，消费级硬件跑得动吗？

title: Claude Code users reflect on 317 markdown files across 14 repositories
content: A developer shares their experience using Claude Code across 14 repositories, which generated 317 markdown documentation files. A tool was built to help organize and deduplicate these AI-generated documents, highlighting both the productivity gains and documentation management challenges of AI coding assistants.
quote: AI编程助手越来越强，初级工程师该转型了。

title: Wandesk: One command to turn Claude Code and Codex into an operating system
content: Wandesk is a new tool that transforms AI coding assistants like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex into an operating-system-like environment. With a single command, developers get file management, process control, and multi-agent orchestration capabilities through their AI assistant interface.
quote: 每天一个AI新名词，大脑缓存已溢出。

title: eHubs: Manage skills, rules, commands, and agents across Codex, Claude, and Cursor
content: eHubs is a cross-platform management tool that allows developers to synchronize skills, rules, commands, and agent configurations across multiple AI coding tools including Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor. Solves the configuration fragmentation problem for developers using multiple AI assistants.
quote: AI安全创业正在变成新风口。

title: Give your Laravel AI agent real-time web knowledge through function calling
content: A tutorial on integrating real-time web search capabilities into Laravel AI agents using function calling. Demonstrates how to build agents that can fetch current information from the web, process it, and incorporate it into responses - moving beyond static training data limitations.
quote: 训练成本降了，但推理成本呢？

title: Calvino: Codex (GPT-5.6) brings Invisible Cities to life through AI interpretation
content: Calvino is an experimental project using OpenAI Codex (GPT-5.6) to generate creative interpretations of Italo Calvino's Invisible Cities. The project showcases the creative potential of large language models in literature and art, blending algorithmic generation with literary analysis.
quote: 欧洲AI军团崛起，不再只是美国的游戏。
